creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
This patch is actually insufficient to make the port work on 10.0+, 
 tested at least on 10.0-RELEASE, since it prevents updating the shebangs 
 to target the right version of lua.
 
 Other than that, the issue still stands. We can't find gcc. WITH_GCC=yes 
 would probably be sufficient, but not ideal. Please test and fix.
 
 - Nikolai Lifanov
